name: AirVape X
summary: A slim pocket-sized hybrid vaporiser for dry herb and concentrates with a full ceramic vapour path, for patients who want discretion.
description: The AirVape X is one of the slimmer portables available, designed to disappear into a pocket. Hybrid convection and conduction heating with an all-ceramic interior delivers smooth, clean-tasting vapour, and fully adjustable temperature control from 93C to 220C lets you set your dose by degree. It handles both dry herb and concentrates, with a 0.25g chamber and a clear LED display. Battery life is modest given the slim 1300mAh cell, so it suits lighter sessions rather than all-day heavy use. A good choice for patients who value a discreet, flat profile and ceramic flavour, backed by a limited lifetime warranty.

specs.label: Dimensions
specs.value: 10.4cm L x 4.6cm W x 1.2cm H (4.1in L x 1.85in W x 0.48in H)
